mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT api.resource_code FROM sys_button_api_binding bind INNER JOIN sys_resource btn ON btn.id = bind.button_resource_id INNER JOIN sys_resource api ON api.id = bind.api_resource_id WHERE btn.resource_code = #{buttonCode} AND btn.resource_type = 'BUTTON' AND btn.status = 1 AND api.resource_type = 'API' AND api.status = 1 ORDER BY api.resource_code
